body:
## Summary
- Require `isPro === true` before granting unlimited daily reviews.
- Fall back to the free daily review cap for malformed `freeCap` values.
- Treat malformed persisted per-day counts as zero so remaining-review math stays finite.

## Validation
- `node --test --test-name-pattern 'remainingDailyReviews|isColorAllowed' tests/v1-1-review-store.test.js tests/v1-1-highlights-store.test.js`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `npm run validate:content`
- `git diff --check`

Note: the queued command form with `--test-name-pattern` after file paths ran unrelated tests under the local Node version; rerunning with the filter before the file list exercised the intended focused cases.
title: Harden pro-gated learning review limits
